cit.basis: Flat 10% corporate income tax (Danok na dobivka) administered by the Public Revenue Office (UJP).
cit.note: AI-estimated: standard 10% flat CIT. Verify current rate, base adjustments and reliefs against official guidance before filing.

vat.note: AI-estimated: standard VAT 18% (DDV). Reduced rates (e.g. 5%/10%) may apply to specific goods and services.

personal_income_tax.note: AI-estimated: flat personal income tax applies; not modelled in this SME estimator.

metadata.verification_note: RATES IN THIS PACK ARE AI-ESTIMATED AND MUST BE SOURCE-VERIFIED against the official North Macedonian tax authority (https://www.ujp.gov.mk/) before any production filing.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are AI-estimated and simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Base adjustments, sector rates, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
